title: .editorconfig
content:
root = true

[*]
charset = utf-8
end_of_line = lf
indent_size = 2
indent_style = space
insert_final_newline = true
trim_trailing_whitespace = true

[dist/**]
generated_code = true

[versions.json]
generated_code = true
insert_final_newline = false

title: CHANGELOG.md
content:
# CHANGELOG

## 1.0.7
* Update to 3.8.0

## 1.0.6
* Update to 3.7.1

## 1.0.5
* Update to 3.7.0

## 1.0.4
* Update to 3.6.4

## 1.0.3
* Update to 3.6.2

## 1.0.2
* Update to 3.5.0

## 1.0.1
* Update to 3.5.0-beta.0

## 1.0.0
* 初期リリース
